email_subject: Sollicitatie — Allround medewerker premium outdoor design
email_body:
Beste mevrouw Loontjens,

Met veel enthousiasme reageer ik op de vacature voor Allround medewerker bij Chapeau. Uw oproep voor een afwisselende rol in customer service, logistiek, e-commerce en operations sluit naadloos aan bij mijn ervaring.

Bij Episto (junior digital marketer) beheer ik bestellingen en voorraad in Shopify, plan ik leveringen en volg ik orders op van A tot Z. Daarnaast heb ik bij Katoen Natie gewerkt in een hoogvolume magazijnomgeving, waar ik nauwkeurigheid en efficiëntie combineerde. Mijn technische achtergrond in webdesign en SEO helpt me om online collecties te beheren en te updaten.

Ik spreek vloeiend Engels en Turks, en mijn Nederlands is B1 (ik volg lessen om dit te verbeteren). Ik woon in Zwijndrecht, vlakbij Gent, en ben flexibel inzetbaar.

Graag licht ik mijn motivatie toe in een gesprek. Mijn cv is bijgevoegd.

Met vriendelijke groet,

Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok

--- English version ---

Dear Ms. Loontjens,

I am very enthusiastic to apply for the Allround medewerker position at Chapeau. Your call for a varied role in customer service, logistics, e-commerce and operations perfectly matches my experience.

At Episto (junior digital marketer) I manage orders and inventory in Shopify, plan deliveries and follow up orders from A to Z. Additionally, I worked at Katoen Natie in a high-volume warehouse environment, combining accuracy and efficiency. My technical background in web design and SEO helps me manage and update online collections.

I speak fluent English and Turkish, and my Dutch is B1 (I am taking classes to improve). I live in Zwijndrecht, near Ghent, and am flexible.

I would be happy to discuss my motivation in an interview. My CV is attached.

Kind regards,

Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok
cover_letter:
Beste mevrouw Loontjens,

Met veel enthousiasme solliciteer ik naar de functie van Allround medewerker bij Chapeau. Uw oproep voor een afwisselende rol in customer service, logistiek, e-commerce en operations sluit naadloos aan bij mijn ervaring en ambitie.

In mijn huidige functie als junior digital marketer bij Episto ben ik verantwoordelijk voor het volledige orderproces: van orderontvangst en voorraadbeheer in Shopify tot leveringsplanning en afterservice. Ik werk dagelijks met digitale systemen en voel me er helemaal thuis. Daarnaast heb ik bij Katoen Natie ervaring opgedaan in een hoogvolume magazijnomgeving, waar ik bestellingen klaarzette en voorraad opvolgde. Deze combinatie van administratieve en praktische taken spreekt me enorm aan.

Wat mij bijzonder aanspreekt in Chapeau is de focus op premium outdoor design en de warme, familiale sfeer. Ik ben een leergierige en flexibele medewerker die graag initiatief neemt. Mijn technische achtergrond in webdesign en SEO stelt me in staat om online collecties in Shopify te beheren en te optimaliseren. Ik werk gestructureerd, communiceer helder met klanten en leveranciers, en heb oog voor detail.

Ik spreek vloeiend Engels en Turks, en mijn Nederlands is B1 (ik volg lessen om dit te verbeteren). Ik woon in Zwijndrecht, vlakbij Gent, en ben fulltime beschikbaar.

Graag maak ik kennis om mijn motivatie verder toe te lichten. Bijgevoegd vindt u mijn cv.

Met vriendelijke groet,

Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok

--- English version ---

Dear Ms. Loontjens,

I am very enthusiastic to apply for the Allround medewerker position at Chapeau. Your call for a varied role in customer service, logistics, e-commerce and operations perfectly matches my experience and ambition.

In my current role as junior digital marketer at Episto, I am responsible for the entire order process: from order receipt and inventory management in Shopify to delivery planning and after-sales service. I work with digital systems daily and feel completely at home. Additionally, I gained experience at Katoen Natie in a high-volume warehouse environment, where I prepared orders and monitored stock. This combination of administrative and practical tasks appeals to me greatly.

What particularly attracts me to Chapeau is the focus on premium outdoor design and the warm, family atmosphere. I am a eager-to-learn and flexible employee who likes to take initiative. My technical background in web design and SEO enables me to manage and optimize online collections in Shopify. I work in a structured way, communicate clearly with customers and suppliers, and have an eye for detail.

I speak fluent English and Turkish, and my Dutch is B1 (I am taking classes to improve). I live in Zwijndrecht, near Ghent, and am available full-time.

I would be happy to meet to further explain my motivation. Please find my CV attached.

Kind regards,

Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok

tailored_cv:
Baver Ok
Digital Marketing · SEO · GEO · Content · Web
Zwijndrecht, Belgium | +32 470 42 48 36 | baverok@gmail.com | linkedin.com/in/baverok

## Profile
Junior digital marketer with hands-on experience in order management, logistics, e-commerce, and customer service. At Episto, I manage the full order cycle in Shopify: from order intake and inventory tracking to delivery planning and after-sales follow-up. I also build and maintain WordPress sites, write SEO content, and track performance with analytics tools. At Katoen Natie, I worked in a high-volume warehouse, preparing orders and monitoring stock. Comfortable with digital systems, administrative tasks, and practical logistics work. Based in Zwijndrecht, next to Antwerp. Works in English and Turkish; Dutch: B1, currently taking classes to improve further.

## Core skills
- Order management & logistics: order processing, inventory management, delivery planning, warehouse operations, stock control
- E-commerce: Shopify store management, product updates, online collection management
- Customer service: order follow-up, afterservice, communication with clients and suppliers
- Digital systems: Shopify, WordPress, Google Analytics, Google Search Console, SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Ads
- Content & CMS: SEO blog & content writing, editorial content publishing, website content management, WordPress site building
- Web & build: WordPress, Elementor, Astra theme, responsive web design, Canva, AI-assisted content tools
- Languages: English (professional), Turkish (native), Dutch (B1)

## Experience

### Junior Digital Marketer — Episto (Remote), 2026–present
- Manage orders from A to Z: order intake, inventory tracking in Shopify, delivery planning, and afterservice
- Plan and coordinate deliveries with clients, suppliers, and installation team
- Monitor stock levels and prepare orders for shipment
- Own on-page SEO for client websites, from keyword research to publishing, improving organic visibility and search rankings
- Write keyword-targeted blog content for client websites to grow organic traffic
- Build and maintain client websites in WordPress using Elementor and the Astra theme, including content uploads and page updates
- Track site performance with SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Analytics, Google Search Console, and Google Ads to guide SEO and content decisions

### Warehouse & Logistics — Katoen Natie (Antwerp), 2025–2026
- Maintained accuracy and efficiency in a high-volume, fast-paced logistics environment
- Prepared orders and monitored inventory

### Front-End Developer — ViviDoctor (Belgium), 2018–2019
- Developed and optimized front-end features for a healthcare web application (AngularJS, JavaScript)

## Projects

### mirook.com — Website Design, SEO & GEO (2025–present)
- Designed and built a multi-page WordPress site (Elementor, Astra) for a Belgian youth chess champion: full site structure, on-page SEO, and social media integration (Instagram/Facebook)
- Implemented structured data (JSON-LD schema, including SportsEvent and FAQPage), entity/knowledge-graph markup, and an llms.txt file to improve visibility across traditional and AI-powered search engines (GEO/AEO)
- Ran iterative technical SEO/GEO audits, measurably raising the site's overall search-health score

## Education
- Karel de Grote Hogeschool, Antwerp — Coursework in Applied Computer Science (2022–2025)
- Celal Bayar University, Türkiye — Coursework in Computer Science (2012–2016)
- Diyarbakır Anatolian High School, Türkiye — High School Diploma (2012)

## References
Available on request.
